metadata.title: Maas Data Assets
metadata.description: Starter catalog of key business, PII, and security-sensitive data assets for the Maas domain.

assets.name: Customer Profile
assets.description: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.
assets.accessScope: customer-facing journeys and approved internal operations
assets.businessMeaning: Core customer account, profile, and preference data used across domain journeys.

assets.name: Customer Contact Point
assets.description: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.
assets.businessMeaning: Verified email, phone, and contactability state used for messaging and recovery.

interfaces.name: customer-contact-point api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Customer Contact Point.

assets.name: Consent Record
assets.description: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.
assets.businessMeaning: Privacy, tracking, and communication consent history with auditable decisions.

assets.name: Identity Credential
assets.description: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.
assets.businessMeaning: Credential metadata, password hashes, or authentication factor references.

assets.name: Session Token
assets.description: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.
assets.businessMeaning: Short-lived authenticated session state, refresh metadata, and revocation information.

assets.name: Access Policy
assets.description: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.
assets.businessMeaning: Authorization rules, entitlements, restrictions, and access guardrails.

assets.name: Audit Log
assets.description: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.
assets.businessMeaning: Security and compliance event trail for sensitive operations and lifecycle changes.

assets.name: Payment Instrument Reference
assets.description: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.
assets.businessMeaning: Tokenized payment method references or vaulted instrument links used in protected commerce flows.

interfaces.name: payment-instrument-reference api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Instrument Reference.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Transaction
assets.description: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.
assets.businessMeaning: Commercial or financial transaction state tracked across purchase, settlement, or payout workflows.

governance.sharingPolicy: approved payment and finance usage only

assets.name: Parking Configuration Policy
assets.description: Configures parking zones, tariffs, permits, exemptions, dwell rules, and city or operator policies across assets and channels.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Parking Configuration & Policy.

interfaces.name: parking-configuration-policy api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Parking Configuration Policy.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Dynamic Pricing Occupancy Optimization
assets.description: Adjusts pricing and occupancy strategy using demand, event, and utilization signals.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Dynamic Pricing & Occupancy Optimization.

interfaces.name: dynamic-pricing-occupancy-optimization api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Dynamic Pricing Occupancy Optimization.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Payment Channel Orchestration
assets.description: Coordinates mobile, kiosk, in-car, partner, permit, and other payment channels through one governed payment-control layer.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Payment Channel Orchestration.

interfaces.name: payment-channel-orchestration api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Payment Channel Orchestration.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Reservations Permit Inventory
assets.description: Handles reservable inventory, recurring permits, visitor parking, and premium access products.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Reservations & Permit Inventory.

interfaces.name: reservations-permit-inventory api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Reservations Permit Inventory.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: City Mobility Intelligence
assets.description: Creates a common city-mobility data layer combining parking, curb, transport, and usage signals.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on City Mobility Intelligence.

interfaces.name: city-mobility-intelligence api
interfaces.description: Access interface for City Mobility Intelligence.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Planning Scenario Outcome Modeling
assets.description: Models policy, pricing, and curb interventions against forecast and observed mobility outcomes.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Planning, Scenario & Outcome Modeling.

interfaces.name: planning-scenario-outcome-modeling api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Planning Scenario Outcome Modeling.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Transit Fare Open Payment
assets.description: Handles open payment, account-based fare logic, capping, and transport-payment orchestration.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Transit Fare & Open Payment.

interfaces.name: transit-fare-open-payment api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Transit Fare Open Payment.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

assets.name: Transit Operations Telemetry
assets.description: Combines transaction, device, alert, and service data into one transport operations view.
assets.businessMeaning: Reusable domain data centered on Transit Operations Telemetry.

interfaces.name: transit-operations-telemetry api
interfaces.description: Access interface for Transit Operations Telemetry.

governance.sharingPolicy: internal and approved domain consumers only

stores.description: Primary operational database for Customer Profile.

stores.description: Primary operational database for Customer Contact Point.
